reviews.review_title: Honestly? Best Cozy Sim on Quest.
reviews.review_description:
I'm going to be real, I've played a LOT of cozy sims on Quest. Most of them are in Worlds, and the quality is meh at best. So FINALLY getting a cozy Gardening Sim at this quality level is a GODSEND. Think Forever Pets, but with pretty plants, much better music, and a freaking cute cat stuffy companion.

There are still a couple of tiny glitches, which is expected for any brand new VR game. Once the devs get those fixed up, I'm banking on this becoming the perfect hangout for myself and my vr circle to just vibe and chill in.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for such a kind review AinsleyCora! We are definitely working hard to knock out all glitches, weeds, and bugs ASAP 🙏

:David @ Theory Studios

reviews.review_description: This is very cute. I bought the DLC, but thinking I should have waited until the base app is more stable. I got 3 hibiscus grown and a strawberry plant. But I no longer have access to pots or seeds. I can’t turn back pages in the little notebook/guide and there is no tutorial or guide to how anything really works in game. I’ll be checking back in tho, cause it is just so darn cute and full of potential. I would not recommend purchasing the DLC with so many bugs, Meta will not refund DLCs and after one session all the content has vanished and this sim is unplayable.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much ssixx for your feedback, and especially for buying our first Founder's DLC.

The tutorial is part of our Garden Notebook that spawns right in front when you start the game, but it can be very difficult to understand what to do next. We're working hard on improving the experience and can't wait to invite you back in again to check it out.

Thank you!

:David @ Theory Studios

reviews.review_description:
Update 2/25/26 - i'm still having issues with glitching and I can't seem to spawn more than three types of flowers. And some won't grow at all even though I water, fertilize and add sun. Also, there are times the game just goes blank while I'm playing and says the app is not responding so I have to close and reopen several times. I do not have this issue with any other apps. Is there going to be a patch soon? 

Hi. This game is beautiful, but very glitchy. There are certain pots that I put seeds in and the flowers won't bloom at all after several minutes. 

Also, today when I logged in, I had pots all over the place that I didn't purchase and every time I tried to grab a previous pot, it would just spawn and create another one. 

Is there a way that I can start all over again fresh and delete all those pots?

developer_response.body:
Hi Cocopuff75,

I am so sorry you're having these issues. I would love to talk to you over email digging through where the hangups are. We have a suspicion there may be a hardware limit to how many items can be tracked which is causing your issue.

Feel free to email me: david@theorystudios.com . Let me know which kind of headset you're using too.

:David @ Theory Studios

reviews.review_description: I love gardening in real life, so getting to do it in VR too was a total win for me. No dirt under the nails, no back pain — just chill vibes and happy plants 😄 It’s super relaxing and perfect for unwinding.

It has some potential to be a good game. At the moment its really buggy laggy and slow. I found i was unable to get back the hibiscus seed i accidentally lost. I was un able to purchase new seeds. And i feel it should not be a requirement to buy a bundle to unlock a full game. Otherwise it is cozy

developer_response.body:
Hi CrypticRos3,

Sorry you're running into lag! The slowness is not ideal. We hope today's update (pushed just a little bit ago) will help improve that!

Hibiscus: it likes to hide. This is a bug we're hunting down, and we'll make sure we clear it out soon.

The Bundle is there to offer players more! If they like what they see, they can grab a box that doubles the amount of flowers and adds more pots. We know though that the game needs to be in a better state for players to have fun - we're working hard on it 🙏

- Theory Studios

reviews.review_description: I can't keep plants alive to save my life, but now I have a whole little garden in my office. 😄 The graphics are really nice, and Doctor Leaflet is the best boy.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much OracleFish! 🥰

:David @ Theory Studios

reviews.review_description: At first , the shop button was not there But there's an option above your book to exit tutorial. Once I clicked, yes. All the buttons appeared. Shop seed décor and pots. ☺  I could progress now. ☺ Still wish I could of finish the tutorial 😂 But whatever I could move on now 😂  We'll give another review in a week

developer_response.body:
Hi Deadpoolken,
We should have that fixed, and we are working on a handful of new fixes to release soon too! Plus, adding a few new plants :) Thank you for the feedback!

:David @ Theory Studios

reviews.review_description: It was cute but very glitchy and got very irritating, I tried to give it a chance and it was just to annoying sorry, cute idea though

developer_response.body:
Hi Kelley_Felipe,
I am so sorry to hear! That's not what we want players to experience. We're working on more updates to help remove the glitchiness.

We did discover the culprit of a few nasty bugs, like multiple pots. So we're digging in very deep to fix it. I hope to give you a new update on it soon :)

:David @ Theory Studios

reviews.review_description: First, the game is fantastic.  Definitely try it!  I became stuck in the tutorial even after a reinstall.  It is entertaining and educational.

developer_response.body:
Thank you JimE1971!

Let us know what you would like from us to get that rating higher. We know Tutorial needs a bit more love for sure!

:David @ Theory Studios

reviews.review_description: There's a bug because there's no store button, everything disappears and it's stuck. I really like the game, I want to continue, I hope it will be installed.

developer_response.body:
Hi Julia22,
We should have that fixed now, let us know what you think!

:David @ Theory Studios

reviews.review_description: Stuff I really like: it feels calm, the plants have personality, and the backgrounds and music help set a nice mood.
Taking a break from home chores or office work, this is awesome to play in between. So much potential. Looking forward to future content

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much gcdiddy! We have a great team of artists working on new content and we can't wait to share it with you and the rest of the team :)

:David @ Theory Studios
